lastSeason.label: Premier League · 2025/26 · Champions
lastSeason.headline: Twenty-two years. The wait is over.

trophies.title: Division One Champions
trophies.note: Thomas. One minute to go. Anfield.

trophies.title: Division One Champions
trophies.note: Lost only once. The forgotten title.

trophies.title: The Double
trophies.note: The most complete side before the Invincibles.

trophies.title: FA Cup
trophies.note: The drought ends. 3–2 vs Hull. Extra time.

trophies.title: Premier League Champions
trophies.note: Twenty-two years. The title is home.

06-09.text: The Invincibles confirmed as champions. 26 wins, 12 draws, 0 defeats. Henry. Bergkamp. Vieira. Football had never seen anything like it.

06-11.text: Charlie George lies flat on the Wembley turf. Extra-time winner against Liverpool seals the first Double in the club's history.

07-01.text: Gervinho becomes the first signing of a rebuilding summer. The Emirates project enters its hardest decade.

08-14.text: The unbeaten run reaches 43 league games against Middlesbrough — bettering Forest's record that had stood for 25 years.

08-22.text: Dial Square FC is founded by munitions workers in Woolwich. Fifteen men, one football, and the start of everything.

09-26.text: Tony Adams strides out of defence and Steve Bould lifts the pass over the top. THAT goal against Everton, the title sealed at Highbury.

10-04.text: Fabregas dismantles Blackburn 6–2 with a hat-trick of assists. Peak pass-them-to-death era.

11-01.text: Rooney ends the 49. Old Trafford, a penalty that wasn't, and the ugliest pizza in football history follows in the tunnel.

12-26.text: A 6–1 Boxing Day win over Sheffield United in front of a frozen Highbury. The fixture computer has loved Boxing Day ever since.

02-01.text: Wenger's 1,000th game in charge approaches as Arsenal put four past Everton. Longevity nobody will repeat.

03-08.text: Henry scores at the Bernabéu and Arsenal knock out Real Madrid en route to the Paris final. The away end never sat down.

04-26.text: Two-nil at the Etihad. The first league win there in over a decade, and the day the title race tilted for good.

05-24.text: The final whistle at the Emirates. Champions of England for the first time in twenty-two years. The Arteta project, complete.
